title: EarnEvent
description: Wire contract for the earn-events queue. Producer: services/partners (Java record com.ospreyloyalty.partners.purchases.EarnEvent, serialized by Spring AMQP Jackson2JsonMessageConverter). Consumer: services/members (ApplyEarn.EarnEvent, deserialized with JsonSerializerDefaults.Web). This schema is the single source of truth for that shape; both sides declare they keep it in sync by hand. See docs/decisions/0014-contract-testing.md.

memberId.description: Osprey member id the points accrue to.

amount.description: Purchase amount. Java BigDecimal / .NET decimal. Serialized as a JSON number.

rate.description: Earn rate travelling with the event so members needs no partner reference data. Java double / .NET decimal.

idempotencyKey.description: Dedup key. At-least-once delivery means members may see the same key twice; a duplicate is a success, not an error (ADR-0002).

occurredAtUtc.description: ISO-8601 instant. Partners serializes with WRITE_DATES_AS_TIMESTAMPS disabled, so this is a string, never an epoch number.

correlationId.description: Optional trailing field (ADR-0002 additive convention). Older payloads omit it; the .NET record binds it to null.

authToken.description: Optional zero-trust service token partners stamps (ADR-0007). Null when auth is off; members ignores it then.
